wins.event: Q1 revenue $14.9B record, +25% YoY; EBITDA $10.1B record (+41%)
AI revenue $4.1B (+77% YoY) — beat guide of $3.8B; Q2 guide $4.4B (+44% YoY)
2 additional hyperscalers selected Broadcom for custom XPUs (now 4 in development beyond 3 in production)
$60-90B 2027 AI SAM reaffirmed; 4 new customers NOT included → potential expansion
VMware: 70% of largest 10K customers signed for VCF; 39 customers on Private AI Foundation

risks.event: Non-AI semi recovery slower than expected; flattish QoQ in Q2
Industrial resales down double-digits Q1, expected continued decline Q2
Enterprise networking flat through H1 2025 on continued channel inventory work-through

guidance.notes: Q2 guide $14.9B (+19% YoY); EBITDA 66%. Long-range $60-90B AI SAM by 2027 reaffirmed; 4 newly engaged customers represent further upside (not in SAM).

_notes: Customer count expansion (3+2 to 3+4) is the headline. CEO confident. Non-AI cyclical drag persists but story dominated by AI ramp acceleration.
